2603.28643.title: The Ultimate Tutorial for AI-driven Scale Development in Generative Psychometrics: Releasing AIGENIE from its Bottle
2603.28643.paper_summary: Psychological scale development has traditionally required extensive expert involvement, iterative revision, and large-scale pilot testing before psychometric evaluation can begin. The `AIGENIE` R package implements the AI-GENIE framework (Automatic Item Generation with Network-Integrated Evaluation), which integrates large language model (LLM) text generation with network psychometric methods to automate the early stages of this process. The package generates candidate item pools using LLMs, transforms them into high-dimensional embeddings, and applies a multi-step reduction pipeline -- Exploratory Graph Analysis (EGA), Unique Variable Analysis (UVA), and bootstrap EGA -- to produce structurally validated item pools entirely *in silico*. This tutorial introduces the package across six parts: installation and setup, understanding Application Programming Interfaces (APIs), text generation, item generation, the `AIGENIE` function, and the `GENIE` function. Two running examples illustrate the package's use: the Big Five personality model (a well-established construct) and AI Anxiety (an emerging construct). The package supports multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq, HuggingFace, and local models), offers a fully offline mode with no external API calls, and provides the `GENIE()` function for researchers who wish to apply the psychometric reduction pipeline to existing item pools regardless of their origin. The `AIGENIE` package is freely available on R-universe at https://laralee.r-universe.dev/AIGENIE.
2603.28643.paper_summary_zh: 心理量表的開發傳統上需要廣泛的專家參與、反覆修訂和大規模的試點測試，才能開始心理測量評估。`AIGENIE` R 套件實現了 AI-GENIE 框架（自動項目生成與網絡集成評估），該框架將大型語言模型（LLM）文本生成與網絡心理測量方法相結合，以自動化這一過程的早期階段。該套件使用 LLM 生成候選項目池，將其轉換為高維嵌入，並應用多步驟的降維流程——探索性圖分析（EGA）、獨特變量分析（UVA）和自助 EGA——以完全 *in silico* 的方式生成結構驗證的項目池。這個教程分為六個部分介紹該套件：安裝與設置、理解應用程式介面（APIs）、文本生成、項目生成、`AIGENIE` 函數和 `GENIE` 函數。兩個運行示例展示了該套件的使用：大五人格模型（一個成熟的構念）和 AI 焦慮（新興的構念）。該套件支持多個 LLM 供應商（OpenAI、Anthropic、Groq、HuggingFace 和本地模型），提供完全離線模式，無需外部 API 調用，並為希望將心理測量降維流程應用於現有項目池的研究人員提供 `GENIE()` 函數，無論其來源如何。`AIGENIE` 套件可在 R-universe 上免費獲得，網址為 https://laralee.r-universe.dev/AIGENIE。
2603.28643.author: Lara Russell-Lasalandra et.al.
2603.28643.authors: Lara Russell-Lasalandra, Hudson Golino, Luis Eduardo Garrido, Alexander P. Christensen
